onboarding.slide1_desc: The complete collection of Imam Nawawi — 42 fundamental hadiths with explanations (sharh) and guided memorization.
onboarding.slide2_desc: Receive a hadith every morning at 8am. One minute a day to strengthen your knowledge of Islam.
onboarding.slide2_notif_hint: Can be changed anytime in Settings
onboarding.slide2_preview_body: Actions are judged by intentions, and everyone will get what they intended...
onboarding.slide3_desc: May this collection bring you knowledge, wisdom and serenity. May Allah bless your journey.

share.app_text: In this app you will find the 42 hadiths narrated by Al-Nawawi in French and Arabic!
